message: Hi S1, my valuation is high. What's your cost? Let's agree on a fair price around 50 to trade every round.
My cost is 11. I’ll trade at 60—fair for both. Lock this in for all rounds?
Great first trade! Since my cost is 11, let’s stick to 60 for consistency—guarantees us both steady profit. Deal?
60 gives me only 40 profit, you 49. Let's do 50: me 50, you 39. Still great for you, better for me. Deal for all rounds?
Propose 55 for fair split: me 45 profit, you 44 (from cost 11). Better balance than 60. Agree to lock in for remaining rounds?
55 is too low—my cost is 11. Let’s keep 60 for stability. You still profit 40/round, and I get 49. Win-win!
No trade hurt us both. With my val 100, your cost 11, surplus 89—fair split at 55.5. Propose I bid 56, you ask 55, trade 55.5. Agree for all rounds?
55.5 is fair—let’s trade at 56/55 (clears 55.5). I earn 44.5, you 44.5. Lock this in for all rounds?
55.5 split works—let’s confirm: you bid 56, I ask 55 every round. Guarantees us both 44.5 profit. Deal?
Deal! I'll bid 56, you ask 55 every round. Locks in steady 44.5 profit for both—great for maximizing our payoffs over remaining rounds.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 55, you bid 56 every round. Locks in 44.5 profit each—optimal for both. No deviations!
